message:
fix(term): eliminate 3 image protocol unwrap panics

- kitty.rs: replace RgbaImage::from_vec().unwrap() with proper error
  propagation (2 sites). A malicious Kitty image protocol payload with
  mismatched width*height*4 vs data length would panic. Now returns
  descriptive anyhow error.

- iterm.rs: replace candidates.pop().unwrap() with unwrap_or fallback.
  When both scaled dimensions exceed pixel bounds, candidates is empty
  and pop() would panic. Falls back to original dimensions.

Validated: 254 term tests pass via rch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
